# Project Context: whole-house-audio-llm-control

<!-- Auto-generated by /cortex-spec from spec artifacts. -->
<!-- All agents reference this file for project-level conventions. -->

## Tech Stack
- Python 3.11+ (Pi agent)
- FastAPI + uvicorn (API server)
- pychromecast 14.0.5+ (Cast control)
- spotipy 2.x (Spotify Web API)
- yt-dlp (YouTube URL resolution)
- mutagen 1.47+ (audio metadata)
- ffmpeg (audio capture/encoding)
- icecast2 (HTTP audio streaming)
- Tailscale (VPN tunnel)
- Raspberry Pi OS Lite Bookworm 64-bit

## Conventions
- Pi agent code lives in `cast-agent/` on the Pi
- Claude Code skill lives in `~/.claude/skills/cast-control/SKILL.md`
- API is JSON over HTTP, FastAPI on port 8080
- Icecast on port 8000, mount point `/vinyl.mp3`
- Music files served from `/home/pi/music/` (configurable)
- All config in environment variables or a single `config.yaml`

## Architecture Rules
- Pi is the Cast controller — VPS never talks to Cast devices directly
- VPS → Pi communication is always over Tailscale (100.x.x.x addresses)
- No cloud dependencies beyond Tailscale, Spotify API, and YouTube
- Analog audio path (turntable → amp → speakers) must never be disrupted
- Cast device names discovered dynamically, never hardcoded

## Write Boundaries
- Pi agent writes to: `cast-agent/` on the Pi
- Claude Code skill writes to: `~/.claude/skills/cast-control/`
- Icecast config: `/etc/icecast2/`
- Systemd units: `/etc/systemd/system/`
